---
title: "Your News Title Goes Here"
description: "A brief 1-2 sentence summary of the event. This will appear on the main news.qmd listing page."
author: "Author Name"
date: "1980-01-01"          # MUST be in YYYY-MM-DD format for Quarto to sort properly
categories: ["Award", "Grant", "Conference", "Defense"] # Keep only the relevant tags
image: "path/to/image.jpg"  # Optional: Adds a thumbnail to the news feed
draft: true                 # Prevents this template from showing up on the live site
format: html
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: solana
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: rounded
---

## Event Summary

Write the full details of your news item here. Because this is a standard Quarto document, you can use all your usual formatting, buttons, and layouts.

### Example content:
We are thrilled to announce that **[Name]** successfully defended their thesis on [Date]. The jury commended their work on [Topic]. 

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Link to manuscript:** [Download PDF](#)
:::
